brief_justification: Correctly answers No and identifies a better analog with valid structural reasoning; multi-level analysis maps each immunity component to a cybersecurity counterpart and distinguishes sub-types of IDS; proceeds linearly without reflecting on potential biases or examining its own reasoning method; verifies by systematically checking each structural element of the analogy against IDS properties, though no counterfactual or boundary testing; acknowledges two distinct IDS subtypes and their limitations but presents threat intelligence as the answer without stating confidence levels or what evidence would revise the conclusion; systematically evaluates the proposed term, distinguishes signature-based from anomaly-based IDS, and proposes a specific alternative with reasons for each rejection; the table format makes every derivation step explicit and fully reproducible by a third party.
